title: Blue or Pink Gender Reveal Banner (213cm) - Premium Dual-Colored Party Decoration - Perfect for Baby Showers & Unforgettable Memories - 1 Pc
features: STRIKING DUAL-COLORED DESIGN: Our blue or pink gender reveal banner (213cm) adds a vibrant pop of color to your celebration with its eye-catching blue and pink hues, perfect for building anticipation and excitement in your baby shower.

DURABLE & STURDY MATERIAL: Crafted from premium, high-quality material, this gender reveal banner is designed to withstand various weather conditions and maintain its impeccable appearance throughout your event.

PERFECT FOR BABY SHOWERS & MEMORIES: Create long-lasting, unforgettable memories with this versatile banner, making it the ideal decoration piece for baby showers, gender reveal parties, and even as a memorable keepsake for your child's nursery.

EFFORTLESSLY EASY TO USE: Set up and display our 213cm (7ft) gender reveal banner in just minutes! With its simple, user-friendly design, you'll have your party space looking fabulous in no time, letting you focus on enjoying your special occasion.

CAPTURE UNFORGETTABLE MEMORIES: Immortalize your baby's gender reveal moment by displaying our stunning blue or pink gender reveal banner as the backdrop for all your memorable photos - creating a precious keepsake for you and your family to cherish.
description: From the manufacturer Coordinating Solid Colours Lovely Pink Powder Blue Gender Reveal Party Add-On Items What will baby be? What do you think? Boy or Girl? Blue or Pink? Add some fun and mystery to your special occasion and impress your guests with these simple and elegant designs! A great selection of tableware, accessories and decorations will let you celebrate the joyous occasion in style! Mix and match with our solid colour items to create the perfect party look! We Have Everything Covered! Paper Plates, Napkins, Paper Cups, Decorations & Accessories... More coordinating ranges available! Are you having helium balloons? Don’t forget the curling ribbon and weights! And if Gender Reveal Party isn't your style, check out our other elegant options.
